description_long: This humanoid robot features a striking, angular design with elongated, blade-like appendages extending from its upper body, giving it a dynamic and futuristic appearance. Its legs are digitigrade, with multiple visible joints and mechanical actuators, suggesting high mobility and agility. The central torso is compact and reinforced, with exposed mechanical components and a streamlined, aerodynamic profile. The arms are slender and appear to be multi-jointed, ending in claw-like structures that hint at dexterous manipulation capabilities. The surface is predominantly metallic with dark, glossy panels and subtle red and white accents, contributing to a high-tech, industrial aesthetic. There are no visible facial features, and the head is integrated into the upper torso, emphasizing function over anthropomorphic form.
description: A sleek, angular humanoid robot with blade-like upper appendages, digitigrade legs, and a compact, mechanical torso. Its dark metallic finish and exposed joints give it a futuristic, agile appearance.
description_view_0: Rear view highlighting the elongated blade-like appendages and the mechanical structure of the legs and torso.
description_view_1: Side view showing the slender, multi-jointed limbs and the aerodynamic profile of the upper body.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the digitigrade legs, compact torso, and the absence of a distinct face or head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the mechanical joints and the angular, streamlined design of the limbs.
attribute_pose: The robot is in a standing pose with its legs bent at multiple joints, arms extended outward and upward, and blade-like appendages raised above the torso. The torso is upright and compact, with no distinct head.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated metallic and composite panels as part of its structure, with no decorative coverings.
attribute_facial_features: No visible facial features; the head is integrated into the torso with no eyes, mouth, or nose present.
attribute_limb_articulation: The robot has multi-jointed arms and legs with visible hinge and rotary joints, allowing for a wide range of motion. The limbs appear rigid but highly articulated, ending in claw-like extremities.
